lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches, dents, or rust. The interior shows no signs of wear or staining. All mechanical and electronic components are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant mechanical attention. The exterior shows substantial wear, including rust and noticeable body damage. The interior is in rough shape with visible tears and stains. The car is being sold as-is.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition, offering a reliable and comfortable driving experience for its next owner. It has been well-maintained, featuring a clean interior and a smooth ride. While there are some minor signs of wear consistent with its age, it remains a solid and dependable choice for anyone looking for quality at a great price!

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine and absolutely no scratches, dents, or chips. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic feature functions perfectly. It has been meticulously maintained with a full service history, always garage-kept, and never driven in inclement weather. This is a rare find for a collector or a discerning buyer who demands a vehicle in showroom state.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The exterior shows substantial wear, including several large dents, visible rust on the rocker panels, and significant clear coat failure on the hood and roof. Inside, the interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery on the front seats and several missing trim pieces. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and the transmission shifts harshly, indicating the need for major repairs. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is best suited as a parts car or a dedicated restoration project for an experienced mechanic.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no visible wear and boasting a mechanical pedigree that mirrors its factory-fresh appearance. Discerning buyers will appreciate the immaculate interior and the flawless exterior finish. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such singular preservation.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty in person—it is absolutely stunning and looks like it just rolled off the lot. I've taken incredible care of it, keeping it garage-kept and spotless inside and out. It’s a total dream to drive and honestly feels brand new. If you're looking for something perfect, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Presenting an investment-grade E92 M3, powered by the S65 4.0L V8—a high-rev
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Maintenance records available. Inspections welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional 2019 Porsche 718 Cayman that stands as a benchmark for showroom-quality preservation. The Jet Black Metallic exterior is absolutely flawless, having been protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating that ensures a deep, mirror-like finish free of any rock chips or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather seats show no bolster wear, the carpets are immaculate, and it has been kept in a strictly smoke-free, climate-controlled environment. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history exclusively performed at authorized Porsche centers. Every switch, dial, and electronic system functions perfectly. This car has never seen inclement weather and has been meticulously hand-washed only. For the collector or enthusiast seeking a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line, this is an unparalleled opportunity to own a masterfully maintained piece of engineering.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in superlative condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and functioning with the precision of a showroom-fresh model. For the discerning driver who demands perfection, this represents an unparalleled acquisition opportunity.

We are pleased to present this meticulously preserved vehicle, currently maintained in showroom condition. This unit exemplifies automotive excellence, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in pristine, original state. Meticulously serviced and stored in a climate-controlled environment, this specimen represents an uncompromising opportunity for the discerning collector who demands the highest standards of quality and performance.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—it’s basically like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, and it runs like an absolute dream. You really have to see it in person to believe how spotless it is. Perfect for someone who wants that brand-new feel without the brand-new price tag. Let me know if you want to take it for a spin!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3 in pristine condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, utilizing individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system for optimal volumetric efficiency across the power band. Power is delivered through a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a limited-slip differential. The chassis remains structurally flawless with proactive subframe reinforcement and a fully documented service history, including rod bearing and VANOS maintenance. The exterior retains its factory depth and luster with all original VIN tags present, while the interior showcases immaculate Nappa leather and tight bolsters. Mechanically, the suspension geometry is precise, with zero bushing deflection, providing the quintessential analog driving experience expected of this iconic platform.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Full service history. No defects. Clean title.

This 2012 Porsche 911 Carrera is a true time capsule, presented in a condition that can only be described as showroom quality. The Basalt Black Metallic paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster thanks to a professional multi-stage paint correction and high-end ceramic coating; there are no rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks to be found. Inside, the Black leather interior remains firm and supple, with absolutely no wear on the seat bolsters or steering wheel. It has been garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never seen rain. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. Every service has been performed at authorized dealerships, with a comprehensive binder of maintenance records included. The engine pulls smoothly through the entire rev range, and the transmission shifts with factory-new precision. It sits on flawless original wheels wrapped in fresh Michelin Pilot Sport tires. This is an investment-grade example for a discerning buyer who refuses to settle for anything less than perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled preservation. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear to its exterior finish or interior appointments. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal are absolute. This is an exceptional acquisition opportunity for the discerning collector who demands a vehicle of the highest caliber.

Presenting an immaculate specimen preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting flawless bodywork and a meticulously maintained interior that reflects a commitment to excellence. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than aesthetic and functional perfection, this offering stands without peer.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty! I have babied this car since day one, and it honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It is in truly pristine condition—not a single scratch or speck of dust to be found. I am so sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love with it just like I did. Come by and take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!
Offered is a museum-grade E92 M3 featuring the legendary S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8. This specimen boasts a flawless factory finish and zero mechanical compromises.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Clean title. Full service history.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a vehicle that looks and feels as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage and boasts a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish—not a single stone chip or swirl mark to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any creasing, the carpets are spotless, and every technological feature functions with factory precision. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history exclusively from certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a drive that is as tight and responsive as the day it was manufactured, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a benchmark example of this model. Includes all original manuals, a full set of keys, and a documented history of its pampered life.

Presenting a masterfully preserved specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle is offered in impeccable condition, exhibiting no discernable wear or cosmetic imperfections. From its flawless exterior finish to the pristine, factory-fresh interior, every detail adheres to the highest standards of quality. A rare find for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare acquisition opportunity for the discerning collector, exhibiting flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity that validates its pristine classification. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original showroom delivery. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate the uncompromising caliber of this investment-grade motorcar.

Hey there! Are you looking for your absolute dream ride? This car is in flawless condition and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it runs like a total dream. You won’t find a single scratch on this beauty—it’s been my pride and joy and has been kept in a climate-controlled garage. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Come check it out, you’re going to fall in love at first sight!

Presenting a pristine E92 BMW M3, a definitive example of the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 era. This chassis remains structurally immaculate, featuring the weight-saving carbon fiber roof and a flawless Interlagos Blue finish. Mechanically, the longitudinal V8 delivers linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. Preventive maintenance is exhaustive, including documented rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service to ensure peak reciprocating assembly health. The suspension geometry remains tight
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Original paint. Flawless interior. Full service records. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, maintained to the highest possible standards since day one. The exterior features original factory paint with a deep, glass-like luster, preserved under a professional-grade ceramic coating. There are absolutely no dings, scratches, or swirl marks to be found. Inside, the cabin retains that new-car scent; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any creases or wear, while the dashboard and interior trim remain in showroom condition. Mechanically, this car is flawless. It has been strictly serviced at authorized dealerships with a full paper trail included. Every feature, from the adaptive cruise control to the high-fidelity sound system, operates perfectly. Always garaged and never driven in inclement weather, this is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This motorcar represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an unblemished exterior and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Meticulously serviced and stored in a climate-controlled environment, this specimen offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection. Every component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards of excellence.
